scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run uglify:js
scripts.release: bash -c "level=${1:-patch}; if [[ $level == '-h' || $level == '--help' ]]; then echo 'Usage : npm run release -- [patch|minor|major|x.y.z]'; echo 'Exemples :'; echo '  npm run release -> patch (defaut)'; echo '  npm run release -- minor'; echo '  npm run release -- major'; echo '  npm run release -- 2.1.0'; exit 0; fi; if [[ ! $level =~ ^(patch|minor|major|[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+)$ ]]; then echo 'Invalid level: '$level; echo ''; echo 'Usage : npm run release -- [patch|minor|major|x.y.z]'; echo 'Exemples :'; echo '  npm run release -> patch (defaut)'; echo '  npm run release -- minor'; echo '  npm run release -- major'; echo '  npm run release -- 1.0.0'; exit 1; fi; npm version $level --no-git-tag-version > /dev/null; version=$(node -p \"require('./package.json').version\"); if git tag | grep -q \"^v$version$\"; then echo 'Tag v'$version' already exists, deleting and recreating...'; git tag -d v$version; git push origin :refs/tags/v$version; fi; git tag v$version; npm run changelog; node update-version.js \"$version\" || exit 1; git tag -d v$version; git add package.json package-lock.json CHANGELOG.md changelog.hbs popup.html update-version.js .github/workflows/node.js.yml; git commit -m 'Release v'$version; git tag v$version; git push && git push --tags; echo 'Released v'$version" --
